build.buildCommand: echo '=== Starting build ===' && pwd && ls -la && rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite && echo '=== Installing dependencies ===' && npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit && echo '=== Building ===' && npm run build && echo '=== Build completed ===' && echo '=== Checking dist ===' && ls -la dist/ && echo '=== Checking assets ===' && ls -la dist/assets/ && echo '=== index.html links ===' && grep -o 'src="/assets/[^"]*"' dist/index.html && grep -o 'href="/assets/[^"]*"' dist/index.html
